properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Where thou goest I will go Where thou lodgest I will lodge, Where thou goest I will go Where thou lodgest I will lodge.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I am Ruth, a virtuous woman Into Boaz field, Whose eyes shall I find great favour in Cover me with your garment of love.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: From the field, to the threshing floor From the threshing floor into the garner, From the field, to the threshing floor From the threshing floor into the garner

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are my Kinsman Redeemer The One who covered me, Took me from the field To have rest. No longer in Moab into Bethlehem, United with a near Kinsman.
